Package io.mangoo.email

Class Mail

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.mangoo.email.Mail

extends Object

    svenkubiak

    • Method Detail

      • build

        public static Mail build()
        Creates a new mail instance
        Returns:
        A mail object instance

      • withBuilder

        public Mail withBuilder​(jodd.mail.Email email)
        Sets the org.Jodd.Email instance that the email is based on
        Parameters:
        email - The Email instance
        Returns:
        A mail object instance

      • templateMessage

        public Mail templateMessage​(String template,
                            Map<String,​Object> content)
                     throws MangooTemplateEngineException
        Sets a template to be rendered for the email. Using a template will make it a HTML Email by default.
        Parameters:
        template - The template to use
        content - The content for the template
        Returns:
        A mail object instance
        Throws:
        MangooTemplateEngineException - if rendering of template fails

      • send

        public void send()
          throws MangooMailerException
        Sends the mail
        Throws:
        MangooMailerException - when sending the mail failed
